title: GCD of Array
description: Given n integers, compute their greatest common divisor (GCD). In Optimization mode, an O(n log(max)) solution wins over O(n²).
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n positive integers.
outputSpec: The GCD of all n integers.

botCodes.code:
from math import gcd
from functools import reduce
n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
print(reduce(gcd,a))

let rec gcd a b=if b=0 then a else gcd b(a mod b)
let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let x=ref(Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in for _=2 to n do x:=gcd !x(Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !x
